tasks.title: Structure setup - Create all empty page files
tasks.description: Create empty page files for all routes listed in project-docs/page-list.txt. Pages: signin, signup, recover, faq, privacy, tos, events, profile, and all event/:uid and e/:uid pages.
tasks.details: Reference project-docs/page-list.txt for complete route list. Create empty .tsx files in src/pages/ with basic structure (import React, export default function). Follow existing routing structure with lazy loading pattern from App.tsx.

tasks.title: EventEntry component
tasks.description: Create EventEntry component - event card display with tags, title, dates, and action buttons.
tasks.details: Reference project-docs/page-ui-docs/components/event-entry.txt for full specifications. Props: event (Event type from src/types/events.ts). Layout: box with rows for tags, title, dates, and buttons. Follow guidelines in project-docs/readme.txt.

tasks.title: UploadEntry component
tasks.description: Create UploadEntry component - upload card with three layers (content, gradient overlay, name/buttons).
tasks.details: Reference project-docs/page-ui-docs/components/upload-entry.txt for full specifications. Props: info (ClientInfo), upload (UploadEntry), buttons array. Handle different upload types: photo, video, audio, text. Follow guidelines in project-docs/readme.txt.

tasks.title: Table component
tasks.description: Create Table component - basic table with header row and content rows.
tasks.details: Reference project-docs/page-ui-docs/components/table.txt for full specifications. Props: headerRow (string array), Content (2D array of string or {label, onClick}). Follow guidelines in project-docs/readme.txt.

tasks.title: FilterBox composite
tasks.description: Create FilterBox composite - container with filter utilities, sort buttons, and flex-wrapped items.
tasks.details: Reference project-docs/page-ui-docs/composites/filterBox.txt for full specifications. Props: data array, renderItem function, buttons array. Layout: buttons row, sort utilities row, flex-wrapped rendered items. Follow guidelines in project-docs/readme.txt.

tasks.details: Reference project-docs/page-ui-docs/partials/signInForm.txt for full specifications. Props: onSubmit callback. Centered form card with email/password fields, forgot password link, Google sign-in button, link to /signup. Follow guidelines in project-docs/readme.txt.
